title: Password Protect PDF — Secure Files Offline
h1: Add Password Protection to PDF Files Instantly
description: Encrypt PDF files with AES-256 directly in your browser. Your document never leaves your device. Ideal for users in Riyadh.

sections.title: Why Protect PDFs Locally?
sections.content: Adding a password means the file is sensitive. Never upload sensitive files to a cloud encryptor. Ours runs entirely offline with AES-256 encryption.

sections.title: How to Password Protect a PDF

steps.title: Open PDF
steps.description: Select the PDF you want to lock.

steps.title: Set Password
steps.description: Choose a strong password for encryption.

steps.title: Download Protected PDF
steps.description: Get your AES-256 encrypted PDF immediately.

sections.title: Vault-Level PDF Protection for Riyadh
sections.content: Legal and finance professionals in Riyadh encrypt documents with AES-256 strength without exposing files to any server.

sections.title: AES-256 Encryption — Bank-Grade, Offline
sections.content: Military-grade AES-256 encryption runs in your browser. No key is ever transmitted to any server.

sections.title: Encrypt Any PDF in Under 1 Second
sections.content: AES-256 processing locally takes milliseconds — no upload, no queue, no wait.

faqs.a: AES-256, the same standard used by banks and governments.

faqs.q: Can I set different owner and user passwords?
faqs.a: Yes, you can set both separately.
No, a new encrypted copy is created.

faqs.q: Can I restrict printing or editing?
faqs.a: Yes, permission restrictions can be set alongside the password.
